rows.label: tev061901_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev061901_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Nossu about the weather
in Nightglow Forest.

rows.label: tev061901_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev061901_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Nossu about recent developments.

rows.label: tev061901_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Nossu about the indigens
in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061901_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Nossu about recent developments.

rows.label: tev061901_MSG0001
rows.name:
Well, attacks are hard to
land when fog come out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061901_MSG0002
rows.name:
And thunderstorm give shocky-shocky
attacks even bigger jolt.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061901_MSG0003
rows.name:
Also, more floating sparklies
than usual come out at night.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061901_MSG0004
rows.name:
Sparklies make some mysterious powers
stronger and make Dolls run better.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061901_MSG0005
rows.name:
As Nopon always say, if friend does not like weather
in Nightglow Forest, wait one minute. Or else gear up
by buying lots of traditional Nopon leaf umbrellas.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061901_MSG0008
rows.name:
Kaka say that red hat of Nossu
is very fashionable. So nice!
...Also smart. But mostly nice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061901_MSG0009
rows.name:
Kaka think it will be instant
seller because it helps people
stand out in dark forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061901_MSG0010
rows.name: Nossu hope it will be hit with everyone![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061901_MSG0011
rows.name:
Oh-ho-hooooo! Nossu has to sell
a ton and contribute for Kaka![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061901_MSG0016
rows.name:
Critters here can change bodies
to blend in with environment.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061901_MSG0017
rows.name:
Some are so good that they stop showing
up on radar of friends, so make sure to
look around before plowing ahead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061901_MSG0018
rows.name:
...Oh! And machines belonging to Growth
or whatever they are called have also
been roaming around in forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061901_MSG0019
rows.name:
If one sees friend, run like
wind! Machines are way meaner
than most other critters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061901_MSG0012
rows.name:
Kaka say pom-pom hat of
Nossu is adorable. So nice![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061901_MSG0013
rows.name:
Kaka think it will be instant
seller because it helps bring
out inner cuteness of wearer.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061901_MSG0014
rows.name: Nossu hope this is case![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev061901_MSG0015
rows.name:
Oh-ho-hoooo! Nossu has to sell
a ton and contribute for Kaka![ST:wait ]
